walking_skeleton_strategy: C — real local adapters + fake WorkOS only

totals.note: Error-path tally counts @error-path + @boundary + @degraded explicit tags. Adding the 6 @property scenarios (which encode invariants — most are negative-branch invariants like 'no org created on validation failure') brings the ratio to 59%.

slices.title: Sign-in happy path is server-driven (walking skeleton)
Error recovery is honest and threaded
Expired token freezes mutations and replays in flight

steps.title: Walking skeleton — Maya signs in and reaches the welcome page

scenarios.name: Maya completes sign-in and the welcome page recognizes her by name

scaffolds_to_replace: ui-state/index.ts — POST /flow/login-and-org-setup/begin (currently 501)
ui-state/index.ts — GET /flow/login-and-org-setup/projection (currently 501)
ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — anonymous → authenticating → authenticated_no_org
ui-state/lib/orchestrator.ts — root actor spawn + supervise
ui-state/lib/persistence/redis.ts — XADD/XRANGE round-trip
ui-state/lib/projection.ts — buildProjection() pure function
ui-state/lib/active-scope.ts — resolveActiveScope() for the no-org case
auth-proxy multi-upstream routing rule for /ui-state/* (per ADR-030 §SD1)
steps.acceptance: Walking-skeleton scenario goes from RED (501) to GREEN through the real auth-proxy + ui-state + Redis + fake WorkOS chain. CM-A verified: no test imports ui-state/lib/**.

steps.title: Slice 1 error paths — US-001 + US-002 negative branches

scenarios.name: Maya sees the checking-identity panel while sign-in takes 1.8 seconds
Maya is shown a recoverable-error page when her identity profile is missing required fields
Maya's duplicate organization name is rejected inline without losing her place
Maya's organization survives a transient failure during access reissue
Maya sees a partial-setup recovery page when access reissue exhausts retries
Maya can still reach the welcome page when one ingress route still points to the old frontend

scaffolds_to_replace: ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — authenticating → error_recoverable (failure_modes: workos_profile_corrupt, jwks_not_warm)
ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — authenticated_no_org → creating_org → ready (US-002 happy path with reissue retry)
ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — creating_org → authenticated_no_org on org_validation_failed (inline rejection)
ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — idempotent retry of JWT reissue (3 attempts, then → error_recoverable with partial-setup tag)
backend POST /api/auth/reissue endpoint (upstream-issues UI-1 — confirm presence; add if missing)
auth-proxy stale-config gate validation (the with-stale-config Given clause)
steps.acceptance: All six slice-1 error-path scenarios green. Failure-mode coverage from journey YAML: workos_profile_corrupt, jwks_not_warm (slow), org_validation_failed, jwt_reissue_failed_after_org_create.

steps.title: Slice 1 — ActiveScope resolver invariants (ADR-029 I1-I5)

scenarios.name: Maya's app shell shows organization, name, and project on first paint after deep-linking to a project
Maya cannot view a project that belongs to a different tenant
Maya's stale bookmark to a renamed project reconciles to the project's current name
Maya's deep link with a resource type but no resource id is treated as a project-only link

scaffolds_to_replace: ui-state/lib/active-scope.ts — resolveActiveScope() implementing I1-I5
ui-state/lib/active-scope.ts — scope_reconciled FlowEvent emission for stale-link case
frontend-remix root + nested route loaders that consume the projection
backend cross-tenant guard returning 403 with named diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Scope contract is the single source of truth. The pure function `resolveActiveScope` is unit-tested with zero fixtures (CM-D). The four scenarios exercise the contract via the driving port.

steps.title: Slice 2 — US-003 recoverable error UX

scenarios.name: Maya sees a recoverable-error page with a shareable reference code on a transient failure
Maya's retry threads the same reference code across the second attempt
Maya's blocked sign-in cookie shows a specific copy variant
Maya's third failed retry escalates to a contact-support page
Each recoverable-error event Maya sees is observable for the recovery-rate metric

scaffolds_to_replace: ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — error_recoverable state with underlying_cause_tag
ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — retry-budget tracking (3 attempts → error_terminal)
frontend-remix — RecoverableError component, copy variants table keyed by underlying_cause_tag
auth-proxy — surface auth_recoverable_error_shown / auth_retry_clicked / ready_reached events
steps.acceptance: Slice 2 scenarios green; correlation_id threads through every retry; closed-vocabulary discriminated union for underlying_cause_tag (TS compile-time enforcement). @kpi scenario verifies emittable observability signals (K3).

steps.title: Slice 2 — US-004 TS UserFlowHarness public surface

scenarios.name: Beginning Maya's sign-in reaches the post-sign-in state
Submitting Maya's organization reaches the ready state with the correct organization claim
Forcing a transient failure drives Maya into the recoverable-error state with the original reference code
The harness's scope assertion names every diverged dimension when it fails
The harness surfaces a missing-scope diagnostic when a chat turn is sent without project context
The harness composes with a sibling flow harness without re-implementing sign-in

scaffolds_to_replace: harness/user-flow-harness.ts — fill in all 7 methods (begin_auth, submit_org, assert_state, assert_scope, force_transient_failure, expire_token, assert_jwt_carries_org_claim) per the four-piece contract
ui-state/index.ts — __harness_force_failure__ and __harness_expire_token__ event handlers (flagged surface, dev-mode only)
steps.acceptance: Harness's 7 methods all green. Adapter-integration test: `@adapter-integration` scenarios exercise the harness against the real ui-state tier. Named-column scope diff formatter matches DatasetLayerHarness.assert_exactly_once_via_replay shape (US-004 §Round-2 AC).

steps.title: Slice 3 — US-005 expired token cross-machine freeze + replay

scenarios.name: Maya's chat question replays silently after her access renews
Maya sees a recoverable-error keyed to her original question when silent renewal fails
Maya's two in-flight requests both replay after a single renewal
Maya's other actions are paused while her session refreshes
Maya's replay is abandoned when renewal exceeds the safe window
Maya's signed-in session survives a ui-state restart
All 6 IC invariants (IC-1 through IC-6)
scenarios.note: Implement as property-based tests with generators (DELIVER crafter's call).

scaffolds_to_replace: ui-state/lib/machines/login-and-org-setup.ts — expired_token side-state with silent re-auth invocation
ui-state/lib/orchestrator.ts — broadcastFreeze + broadcastThaw + replay buffer (5s timeout, 16 max)
frontend-remix — non-blocking 'Refreshing your session...' banner with focus management
auth-proxy — silent_reauth_ok / silent_reauth_failed event surface
steps.acceptance: Slice 3 scenarios green; cross-machine FREEZE exercised end-to-end via the actor tree pattern (ADR-028). Journey invariants (IC-1..6) covered as property tests. Slice 3 may pull in Playwright for browser-level focus management (see upstream-issues UI-2).

CM-A_driving_port.rationale: Tests invoke through auth-proxy HTTP only. No test imports production internals.

CM-B_business_language.expected: no matches inside Gherkin Scenario/Given/When/Then lines
CM-B_business_language.rationale: Technical terms live in step methods and harness only. Gherkin uses business domain language.

CM-C_walking_skeletons_and_focused.rationale: One user-centric WS proves the seam end-to-end through the production ingress; the remaining 27 are focused boundary tests per story.

CM-D_pure_function_extraction.rationale: Each pure function is unit-tested with zero fixture cost. Only the thin adapter layer (RedisFlowEventLog, WorkOSClient, BackendClient, AuthProxyClient) is parametrized by environment.
